items.title: The NBA salary cap is double what is was a decade ago, but teams are spending significantly less in free agency
items.author: Lev Akabas
items.body_excerpt:
The NBA salary cap is double what is was a decade ago, but teams are spending significantly less in free agency

There are a lot of factors at play here (increase in early contract extensions, harsher overspending penalties, etc.) but it shows how the NBA offseason has changed

items.title: Hollander POTD Mike Riordan. Long Island kid played at Providence & minors before signing w/NY in 68 as intentional fouler & hustler before trade to BAL in 71-72. Ended up turning into legit starter thru 77. Bio jokes that he "heads straight from a game to YMCA to get extra PT."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Mike Riordan. Long Island kid played at Providence & minors before signing w/NY in 68 as intentional fouler & hustler before trade to BAL in 71-72. Ended up turning into legit starter thru 77. Bio jokes that he "heads straight from a game to YMCA to get extra PT."

items.title: been working on something … never released any of my fiction before but I think this one is ready to be seen …
items.author: Seth Rosenthal
items.body_excerpt: been working on something … never released any of my fiction before but I think this one is ready to be seen …

images.alt:
BABY FROG
CAR
(Crayon scribbles)
Once upon a time there was a baby frog in the road and a truck squished it. A car squished it too.
It grew back up and went home in the stump with the hole. It played and read and cooked. It has a mommy frog and a daddy frog and a lot of baby frogs. It cooked soup and a car went very fast and it got sad. It was too loud. It feels better because it's hugging its mommy. The End.

items.title: LeBron is so old, that kids born on the day of LeBron announcing he was going to the heat (July 8th 2010), are now legally old enough to get their driver’s license in the us today.
items.author: AuthorMain3075
items.body_excerpt: on this day, July 8th 2010, exactly 16 years ago. LeBron James officially announced on live tv that he would leave Cleveland to take his talents to Miami. this is so long ago kids born on that day can now legally drive.

items.title: Here are the teams that reached the World Cup quarterfinals and their global FIFA rankings.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt:
Here are the teams that reached the World Cup quarterfinals and their global FIFA rankings. 
France - 1 
Argentina - 2
Spain - 3 
England - 4
Morocco - 6
Belgium - 8 
Switzerland - 14
Norway - 19

Only two aren’t in the global top eight. In soccer, upsets are rare.
